message:
fix(core): prevent overflow panics in H2 stream IDs, add cooperative yielding to ReadExact, and fix timer ordering

Three targeted safety improvements to core runtime primitives:

1. H2 stream store (src/http/h2/stream.rs):
   - Replace six bare `id + 2` / `+= 2` arithmetic operations with
     `saturating_add(2)` to prevent panic on stream ID overflow near
     u32::MAX boundary.
   - Replace `as u32` cast of active stream count with
     `u32::try_from(...).unwrap_or(u32::MAX)` to prevent truncation
     when more than 2^32 streams exist in the HashMap.

2. ReadExact future (src/io/ext/read_ext.rs):
   - Add a yield_counter that forces a cooperative yield (wake + Pending)
     after 32 consecutive Ready polls from the inner reader. This prevents
     an infinite synchronous spin when a reader continuously returns
     Ready(Ok(())) with zero bytes filled, which would otherwise starve
     the executor. Counter resets on genuine Pending returns.

3. Timer wheel ordering (src/runtime/timer.rs):
   - Replace the `wrapping_sub(...).cast_signed().cmp(&0)` tiebreak with
     a straightforward `other.generation.cmp(&self.generation)`, which
     correctly orders by insertion generation for equal deadlines without
     relying on wrapping arithmetic that can produce wrong results when
     generation values are far apart.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
